title: ACT Node — locale-related metadata (PRD-104)
description: Constraints on the locale-related fields a node MAY carry on `metadata`, plus the cross-locale references PRD-104 owns. The surrounding node envelope is owned by the wire-format / content-block sibling PRDs; this schema covers only the locale-specific shape.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag, same subset as locales-block.schema.json. REQUIRED on every node in Pattern 1 (locale-prefixed IDs / single manifest) sites. MAY be omitted in Pattern 2 (per-locale manifest) sites because the per-locale manifest's `site.locale` is the authoritative source.

translation_status.description: Closed enum (v0.1) describing the translation state of the node or block. Adding a value is a MAJOR change per PRD-108 R5(4).

fallback_from.description: When `translation_status: "fallback"`, identifies the locale whose value was substituted. SHOULD equal `locales.default` of the producing manifest in the typical case.

translations.description: Optional dense form of cross-locale references. An alternative to emitting one `relation: "translation_of"` edge per locale in `related`. Producers MAY emit either or both; consumers MUST tolerate both.

allOf.$comment: PRD-104-R10: when translation_status is 'fallback', fallback_from SHOULD be present and content fields MUST NOT be null.
